data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate 'No-show handling different from direct bookings' lacks direct evidence in the provided data. While the linked use case mentions attendance tracking separate from direct bookings, it does not provide specific evidence or checks related to no-show handling. Therefore, the evidence does not confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming how no-show handling differs from direct bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the no-show handling requirement.
